description.value:
Not actually metal, but a hardened ceramic made from clay and other materials. Technique originated with high-ranking agents of the Great Race of Yith, but also learned by mi-go agents, serpent people, and several cults in Greece and Asia Minor. Black steel weapons are only useful as bladed weapons; their lighter weight makes them ineffective as bludgeons. While not dealing additional damage, the superior edge allows penetration of armor, negating 3 points of protection from standard armor.

TypeWeapon Material
Used ByAnyone
EffectIgnores 3 points of standard armor; bladed weapons only; extremely light (half normal weight); never dulls or rusts; not considered enchanted against creatures needing magical weapons
description.keeper: Effect: Ignores 3 points of standard armor; bladed weapons only; extremely light (half normal weight); never dulls or rusts; not considered enchanted against creatures needing magical weapons
